    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[Activo], [u].[AppUserIdentityId], [u].[Atributos], [u].[Calendario], [u].[EsUsuarioAD], [u].[FechaCreacion], [u].[FechaUltimaActualizacion], [u].[GrupoId], [u].[Nombre], [u].[PrimerApellido], [u].[RolId], [u].[SegundoApellido], [u].[Telefono], [u].[TiempoInactividad], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FechaCreacion] AS [FechaCreacion0], [a].[FechaUltimaActualizacion] AS [FechaUltimaActualizacion0], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName]
    FROM [Usuarios] AS [u]
    LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [u].[AppUserIdentityId] = [a].[Id]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__request_Id_0
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN [UsuarioCorporaciones] AS [u0] ON [s].[Id] = [u0].[UsuarioId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [u0].[UsuarioId]

    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[Activo], [u].[AppUserIdentityId], [u].[Atributos], [u].[Calendario], [u].[EsUsuarioAD], [u].[FechaCreacion], [u].[FechaUltimaActualizacion], [u].[GrupoId], [u].[Nombre], [u].[PrimerApellido], [u].[RolId], [u].[SegundoApellido], [u].[Telefono], [u].[TiempoInactividad], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[FechaCreacion] AS [FechaCreacion0], [a].[FechaUltimaActualizacion] AS [FechaUltimaActualizacion0], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName]
    FROM [Usuarios] AS [u]
    LEFT JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [u].[AppUserIdentityId] = [a].[Id]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @__request_Id_0
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN [UsuarioCorporaciones] AS [u0] ON [s].[Id] = [u0].[UsuarioId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [u0].[UsuarioId]
